summary: Verified all 3 latest fixes on PlanMove landing (mobile responsiveness/no sticky, static hero visual, simplified WA hover). All acceptance criteria pass on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1440x900).

issues:
'Bereit für
mehr Umsatz?' — the
is used with no whitespace between 'für' and 'mehr' spans; textContent yields 'fürmehr Umsatz?'. Visually fine (line break renders as newline), but reads as one word for screen readers. Minor a11y concern only.

verified_requirements.hero_static_visual: PASS — hero-section, hero-cta-button, phone-mockup present; hero-card-req/wa/mail/answered ABSENT; phone transform stays 'none' before/after lenis.scrollTo(200).
verified_requirements.wa_button_hover_no_glow: PASS — pre/post hover boxShadow='none', transform='none' (identity). bg=rgb(37,211,102), .pm-wa-fill bg=rgb(22,130,34). Fill translateX -330px -> 0 (slide from left).
verified_requirements.mobile_no_sticky_stack: PASS — .pm-sticky-card position='static' on mobile; problem-card-01 scroll delta=-400 (moves with scroll, not pinned). All 7 problem cards present.
verified_requirements.mobile_simpler_layout: PASS — <nav> parent display='none' at 390 (nav-probleme not visible, offsetParent null); header-logo & header-cta-button visible; h1 38px mobile vs 86px desktop; no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=innerWidth=390).
verified_requirements.footer_and_final_cta: PASS — site-footer, footer-headline, footer-cta-button, final-cta-button all render.

action_items:
(Optional/minor) In Footer.jsx line 43, replace 'Bereit für
mehr' with 'Bereit für
mehr' (or use whitespace) so textContent reads 'Bereit für mehr Umsatz?' for a11y/SEO.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All three iteration-2 fixes verified. Only cosmetic a11y note about missing space around
in footer headline. Baselines from iteration_1 (data-testids for cards 01-07, footer, CTAs) remain intact.
